start.text: 👋 Hi, {name}! 🎬 I can download videos from popular platforms: • YouTube • Instagram Reels • TikTok • X (Twitter) 📎 Just send me a video link and I'll forward it to you! ⚡ Inline mode: in any chat type @bot_username link — and the video will be sent right from that chat. ⚠️ Limit: maximum video size is 50 MB
help.text: 📖 How to use the bot: 1️⃣ Copy a video link 2️⃣ Send it to me in chat 3️⃣ Wait while I download and send the video 📱 Supported platforms: • YouTube — youtube.com, youtu.be • Instagram — instagram.com/reel/, instagram.com/p/ • TikTok — tiktok.com, vm.tiktok.com • X/Twitter — twitter.com, x.com 🛠 Extra commands: • /round — convert video to a round video note (max 60 sec) • /gif — convert video to a GIF (max 10 sec) • /mp3 — extract audio from video as MP3 • /voice — convert video/audio/link to a voice message • /language — choose interface language ⚡ Inline mode: Type @bot_username link in any chat — the bot will offer a card to send the video, and the clip will appear right in that chat. Already-downloaded videos are sent instantly from cache. ⚠️ Limits: • Max video size: 50 MB • Private videos are not supported 💡 Tip: If a video is too large, try finding a lower-quality version
help.admin_suffix: 🔐 You are an admin. Use /adminhelp to see management commands.
cache.text: 💾 Cache info: 📁 Videos cached: {count} 📊 Size: {size_mb:.1f} MB Use /clearcache to clear it
download.invalid_link_hint:
🤔 Looks like you tried to send a link, but it's malformed.
Please copy the full video link.
download.send_link_hint:
📎 Send me a link to a video on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok or X/Twitter.
Use /help for usage info.
download.start_status: ⏳ Downloading from {platform}... This may take a moment.
download.generic_error: ❌ An error occurred Try again later or use a different link.
download.cmd.prompt: 🔗 Send a video link from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok or X/Twitter.
download.cmd.url_not_found: 🤔 No link found. Send a video link or press ❌ to cancel.
mp3.prompt: 🎵 Send a video link or an mp4 file. I'll extract the audio and send it as MP3.
mp3.url_not_found: 🤔 No link found. Send a video link or press ❌ to cancel.
mp3.not_video: ⚠️ This is not a video file. Send an mp4 or a video link.
mp3.convert_error: ❌ Conversion error FFmpeg is not available or processing failed.
voice.prompt: 🎤 Send a video link, an mp4 file or an audio file (MP3, etc.). I'll extract the audio and send it as a voice message.
voice.url_not_found: 🤔 No link found. Send a link, a file, or press ❌ to cancel.
voice.unsupported_format: ⚠️ Unsupported format. Send a video, an audio file or a video link.
voice.convert_error: ❌ Conversion error FFmpeg is not available or processing failed.
round.prompt: 🎥 Send a video link or an mp4 file. ⏱ Maximum round-video duration: 60 seconds
round.url_not_found: 🤔 No link found. Send a video link or press ❌ to cancel.
round.not_video: ⚠️ This is not a video file. Send an mp4 or a video link.
round.convert_error: ❌ Conversion error FFmpeg is not available or processing failed.
gif.prompt: 🎞 Send a video link or an mp4 file. ⏱ The video will be trimmed to 10 seconds 📐 Size: 480px · 10 fps · optimized palette
gif.url_not_found: 🤔 No link found. Send a video link or press ❌ to cancel.
gif.not_video: ⚠️ This is not a video file. Send an mp4 or a video link.
gif.convert_error: ❌ Conversion error FFmpeg is not available or processing failed.
inline.hint_message: 📎 To download a video via inline mode, send a link from a supported platform (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X/Twitter).
inline.invalid_message:
❌ Could not recognize the link.
Supported: YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X/Twitter.
inline.error.publish_video: ❌ Failed to publish Inline storage is not configured or the file failed to upload. Ask the admin to configure VIDEO_STORAGE_CHAT_ID.
inline.error.publish_photo: ❌ Failed to publish Inline storage is not configured or the file failed to upload. Ask the admin to configure VIDEO_STORAGE_CHAT_ID.
inline.error.publish_mp3: ❌ Failed to publish MP3 Inline storage is not configured. Ask the admin to configure VIDEO_STORAGE_CHAT_ID.
inline.error.send_mp3: ❌ Failed to send MP3 Try again later.
inline.error.mp3_convert: ❌ Failed to convert to MP3 FFmpeg is not available or processing failed.
admin.only: ⛔ This command is for admins only.
admin.invalid_id: ❌ Invalid user ID. Provide a numeric ID.
admin.users.title: 👥 Allowed users:
admin.userstats.title: 📊 User statistics
admin.userstats.name: 👤 Name: {name}
admin.adminhelp.text: 🔐 Admin commands: 👥 User management: /adduser USER_ID — add a user /removeuser USER_ID — remove a user /users — list all users 📊 Statistics: /stats — global bot statistics /userstats USER_ID — user statistics 💡 Tip: To get a user's ID, ask them to send /id to the bot
menu.round: Convert to a round video note
downloader.error.unsupported_url: URL is not supported. Supported platforms: YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X/Twitter
downloader.error.no_playlist_video: Failed to fetch video from playlist
downloader.error.file_too_large: Downloaded file is too large ({size_mb}MB). Limit: {max_mb}MB
downloader.error.ffmpeg_required:
FFmpeg is required to download this video (audio+video must be merged).
Install FFmpeg, add it to PATH, then try again.
downloader.error.auth_required: Authentication required to view this video
